narrative:
Precinct Eagle Township (precinct in Vinton County) has 351 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.7 percentage points.
